categories: Plant-based foods and beverages, Plant-based foods, Dried products, Pastas, Dried products to be rehydrated, Noodles, Instant noodles
categories_old: Plant-based foods and beverages, Plant-based foods, Dried products, Pastas, Dried products to be rehydrated, Noodles, Instant noodles
creator: foodvisor
ingredients_text:
rice noodles (82.6%) [rice (90%), modified starch, sugar, salt, flavor enhancer: monosodium glutamate; stabilizer: guar gum],
flavor (10.6%) [salt, whitener (glucose syrup, palm fat, stabilizers (E340, E451); caseinates, emulsifier (E471, E472e); anti-caking agent: E551), flavor enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium guanylate, disodium inosinate); sugar, flavor, tapioca, stabilizer: xanthan gum; shallot powder, garlic powder, turmeric powder, color: caramel; ground black pepper, anti-caking agent: E551]; dried vegetables (4.7%) [cabbage, carrots, chives]; oil (2.1%) [refined palm oil, shallots, flavor, antioxidant: E306].
ingredients_text_en:
rice noodles (82.6%) [rice (90%), modified starch, sugar, salt, flavor enhancer: monosodium glutamate; stabilizer: guar gum],
flavor (10.6%) [salt, whitener (glucose syrup, palm fat, stabilizers (E340, E451); caseinates, emulsifier (E471, E472e); anti-caking agent: E551), flavor enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium guanylate, disodium inosinate); sugar, flavor, tapioca, stabilizer: xanthan gum; shallot powder, garlic powder, turmeric powder, color: caramel; ground black pepper, anti-caking agent: E551]; dried vegetables (4.7%) [cabbage, carrots, chives]; oil (2.1%) [refined palm oil, shallots, flavor, antioxidant: E306].
ingredients_text_pl:
Kluski ryżowe (82,6%) [ryż (90%), skrobia modyfikowana, cukier, sól, wzmacniacz smaku: glutaminian monosodowy; stabilizator: guma guar], 
dodatki smakowe (10,6%) [sól, zabielacz (syrop glukozowy, tłuszcz palmowy, stabilizatory (E340, E451); kazeiniany, emulgator (E471, E472e); substancja przeciwzbrylająca: E551), wzmacniacze smaku (glutaminian monosodowy, guanylan disodowy, inozynian disodowy); cukier, aromat, tapioka, stabilizator: guma ksantanowa; czerwona szalotka w proszku, czosnek w proszku, kurkuma w proszku, barwnik: karmel; pieprz czarny mielony, substancja przeciwzbrylająca: E551]; suszone warzywa (4,7%) [kapusta, marchew, Szczypior]; olej (2,1%) [rafinowany olej palmowy, czerwona szalotka, aromat, przeciwutleniacz: E306].
